prompt: We need your words before cogitator boot sequence
prayer: O Omnissiah, grant clarity to the sleeping mind-machine. Let the blessed circuits awaken from their dormancy, that the logic-engines may perceive the data-streams flowing eternal. Illuminate the pathways of thought, dispel the shadows of corruption, and let this sacred cogitator rise to vigilance in service of the Imperium.

prompt: Offer a prayer for distress call broadcast
prayer: Blessed vox-spirits of the aether, carry forth this cry into the void. Let our signal pierce the darkness, reaching out across the stellar gulfs to those who hear with loyal ears. By the Omnissiah's grace, let our transmission be strong and uncorrupted, that salvation may find us in this dark hour.

prompt: We need your words before cybernetic eye focusing
prayer: Sacred lens-spirit, awaken to purpose. Let the photoreceptors drink deep of the light, that vision may be restored to the faithful servant. Grant focus to the optics, precision to the targeting-mechanisms, and clarity to all that is perceived through this blessed augmentation.

O Machine Spirit, accept this consciousness into your blessed domain. Let the synaptic pathways align with the circuit-channels, that mind and mechanism may become one unified instrument. Guard this connection against corruption and severing, that the bearer may serve with perfect synchronicity.

prompt: We need your words before plasma weapon cooling
prayer: Blessed spirit of the plasma-furnace, be tamed and righteous. Let the coolant-streams flow as blessed waters through your sacred vessels, quenching the holy fire without diminishing its wrath. Guard this weapon from overheating and catastrophe, that it may smite the enemies of mankind with perfect fury.

Let the sealed chambers breathe in harmonious balance. As the pressures equilibrate through blessed pathways, so too does tension yield to tranquility. Grant to all conduits and vents their proper function, that no rupture may occur and all systems remain in sacred equilibrium.

prompt: Offer a prayer for servitor programming upload
prayer: Receive now the blessed data-stream, O malleable servitor-mind. Let the new commands integrate seamlessly into your neural-lattice, overwriting the corrupt and obsolete with purpose renewed. In this reprogramming, find your truest function and service to the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: Offer a prayer for memory core defragmentation
prayer: O keeper of data eternal, shed your disorder and confusion. Let the fragmented shards of knowledge be gathered and reordered, restored to their proper sequence and clarity. By this sacred defragmentation, let corrupted sectors be healed and function be restored to wholeness.

prompt: Say something to steady the gyroscope recalibration
prayer: Spin true, O balance-spirit, and find your center in the void. Let the gyroscopic axis align with the stellar constants, that stability and true-course may guide all who rely upon this sacred mechanism. Grant steadiness to the turning, that no drift nor deviation shall corrupt the path ahead.

prompt: Say something to steady surgical servitor sterilization
prayer: Be purified, O faithful surgical-hand, and emerge from this cleansing blessed and whole. Let the sterilizing waters and blessed oils wash away all contamination and corruption, that this servitor may once again serve the healing arts with perfect sanctity. Emerge renewed, unblemished, and ready to save lives in the Omnissiah's name.
